$comment: Geographic anchors for Google Maps searches. Each scrape covers a radius that depends on zoom: ~3km at zoom 14, ~1.5km at zoom 15, ~500m at zoom 16. Together these anchors cover Port Said + Port Fouad densely enough to catch small local businesses that fall below Google's top-N ranking at wider anchors. To extend coverage, append an anchor — the per-anchor matrix in GHA handles deduplication via mergePlace.

anchors.label: Whole Port Said + Port Fouad at zoom 14 (catches edge places single-district anchors miss)
Al Zehour shop strip (high-density commercial area, zoom 16). Targets Scar/Nine/Torino/ZAK and other small businesses that get ranked below the top-N at wider anchors.
West Port Said inner residential — gap between city-center and el-manakh
South-central Port Said — gap between wide-city and el-zohour
East coast central Port Said — gap between city-center and port-fouad (canal-side)
North Port Fouad — extends coverage past the existing port-fouad anchor
Eastern beach / north coast — toward the Port Fouad bridge
